title: Use Query Builder Instead of Raw SQL String Formatting
description: Replace raw SQL string formatting with Query Builder for better safety. type checking and maintainability
energy_impact: Query Builders often produce more optimized SQL and allow for better query planning. Also prevents SQL injection vulnerabilities.
key_insight: Use ORM Query Builders (SQLAlchemy, Django ORM, Frappe QB) instead of raw SQL string formatting. Better security, readability, and often performance.
